parameters.query:
WITH expected AS (
  SELECT * FROM (VALUES
    ('cron_health_check', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'health_check_ok'),
    ('cron_blocklist_cleanup', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'blocklist_cleanup'),
    ('cron_data_integrity', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'data_integrity_ok'),
    ('cron_security_events_auto_resolve', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'security_events_auto_resolve'),
    ('cron_access_log_purge', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'access_log_purge'),
    ('cron_db_size_check', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'db_size_snapshot_ok'),
    ('cron_backup_verify', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'backup_verify_ok'),
    ('cron_stuck_executions', INTERVAL '90 minutes', 'stuck_executions_marked'),
    ('cron_security_events_purge', INTERVAL '8 days', 'security_events_purge'),
    ('cron_vacuum_analyze', INTERVAL '8 days', 'vacuum_analyze'),
    ('cron_health_score_snapshot', INTERVAL '26 hours', NULL),
    ('cron_workflow_audit', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'workflow_audit_ok'),
    ('cron_normativa_freshness', INTERVAL '8 days', 'normativa_freshness_ok'),
    ('cron_business_weekly_email', INTERVAL '8 days', NULL)
  ) AS t(workflow_name, max_silence, action_name)
)
SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.workflow_name) AS workflows FROM (
  SELECT e.workflow_name, e.max_silence::text AS max_silence,
    CASE WHEN e.action_name IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE (SELECT max(created_at) FROM activity_log WHERE action = e.action_name) END AS last_run_at,
    CASE WHEN e.action_name IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - (SELECT max(created_at) FROM activity_log WHERE action = e.action_name)))/3600 END AS hours_ago,
    CASE
      WHEN e.action_name IS NULL THEN 'no_log_action'
      WHEN (SELECT max(created_at) FROM activity_log WHERE action = e.action_name) IS NULL THEN 'never_run'
      WHEN (SELECT max(created_at) FROM activity_log WHERE action = e.action_name) < now() - e.max_silence THEN 'stale'
      ELSE 'ok'
    END AS status
  FROM expected e
) t;
